strategy.name: Blended Confluence Scalper — Jackson + Multi-Indicator
sources: Multi-Indicator Confluence (EMA ribbon, BB, Supertrend, MACD, ATR)
strategy.description: A 5-layer hierarchy strategy. Each layer must be satisfied before the next is considered. Fast RSI(7) entry timing from Lewis Jackson blended with the EMA ribbon, Supertrend, MACD, and BB confluence system. Minimum 5/7 scored points required to fire a trade. Designed for 1m–5m crypto scalping.

layer_1_gates.description: Binary, non-negotiable blockers. ALL must pass or the trade is skipped entirely.

rules.ema_200_gate: Long trades ONLY above EMA(200). Short trades ONLY below EMA(200). No exceptions.
rules.vwap_gate: Long trades ONLY when price is above VWAP. Short trades ONLY when price is below VWAP. VWAP resets at midnight UTC.
rules.rsi14_regime: RSI(14) above 50 = bullish regime, only take longs. RSI(14) below 50 = bearish regime, only take shorts. If RSI(14) is within 2 points of 50, skip the trade — no clear regime.
rules.vwap_distance: Do NOT trade if price is more than 1.5% away from VWAP. Overextended = mean reversion risk too high.

layer_2_intermediate_trend.description: Scored: 2 points available. Must score 2/2 for full conviction, 1/2 = reduce position size by 50%.

rules.ema_21_direction: EMA(21) is rising (current > 3 bars ago) = +1 long. EMA(21) is falling = +1 short.
rules.supertrend_direction: Supertrend (ATR 10, mult 3.0) is bullish (price above line, line is green) = +1 long. Bearish = +1 short.

layer_3_micro_trigger.description: Scored: 2 points available. At least 1/2 required to proceed.

rules.ema_cross: EMA(8) crosses above EMA(21) = +1 long. EMA(8) crosses below EMA(21) = +1 short. This is the primary entry trigger from Lewis Jackson, preserved in full.
rules.macd_histogram: MACD (12,26,9) histogram crosses above zero = +1 long. Crosses below zero = +1 short.

layer_4_entry_timing.description: Scored: 3 points available. This layer refines the exact candle to enter. At least 1/3 required.

rules.rsi_7_entry: RSI(7) drops below 30 in an uptrend (snap-back setup) = +1 long. RSI(7) spikes above 70 in a downtrend = +1 short. Core concept from Lewis Jackson, upgraded from RSI(3) to RSI(7) for 40% less noise.
rules.stochrsi_cross: StochRSI %K crosses above %D from below 20 = +1 long. %K crosses below %D from above 80 = +1 short.
rules.bollinger_position: Price near or touching lower Bollinger Band (20,2) in an uptrend = +1 long (mean reversion setup). Price near upper band in a downtrend = +1 short.

minimum_confluence.gates_required: ALL Layer 1 gates must pass before scoring begins
minimum_confluence.high_conviction: 7/7 = maximum size (1% risk). 6/7 = standard size (0.75% risk). 5/7 = reduced size (0.5% risk). Below 5/7 = no trade.
minimum_confluence.rationale: Raising bar from 3/5 to 5/7 using a larger indicator set. Eliminates marginal trades while capturing the best setups.

ema_cross_scalp.name: EMA 8/21 Cross Scalp (Lewis Jackson Core)
ema_cross_scalp.description: The foundational Lewis Jackson setup, now requiring VWAP + EMA(200) gate before firing.
ema_cross_scalp.target: 1.5:1 R:R minimum. Exit at next VWAP touch or RSI(7) crosses 50.

vwap_bounce.name: VWAP Bounce
vwap_bounce.description: Price pulls back to VWAP in an established uptrend — highest probability setup in this system.
long: Price dips to VWAP from above
Volume picking up on bounce candle
vwap_bounce.stop: Below VWAP — if price closes below, thesis invalid
vwap_bounce.target: Previous session high or 2x ATR(14) above entry

bb_squeeze_breakout.name: Bollinger Band Squeeze Breakout
bb_squeeze_breakout.description: BB compression near VWAP = stored energy. Breakout fires the trade.
entry: First candle closes outside the band
MACD histogram turning in direction of breakout
Preferably: squeeze occurs AT or near VWAP level
bb_squeeze_breakout.target: Opposite BB band, or until Supertrend flips

opening_range_breakout.name: Opening Range Breakout (ORB)
opening_range_breakout.description: Mark first 15-minute high/low. Trade the breakout retest.
entry: Mark H/L of first 15 min of session
Wait for price to break and RETEST the range boundary
RSI(14) above 50 for longs, below 50 for shorts
opening_range_breakout.target: 1x range height projected from breakout point

supertrend_flip.name: Supertrend Flip
supertrend_flip.description: Supertrend color change in direction of VWAP + EMA(21) trend.
supertrend_flip.target: Hold until next Supertrend flip or 2:1 R:R

rsi7_snapback.name: RSI(7) Snap-Back (Lewis Jackson Core, upgraded)
rsi7_snapback.description: RSI(7) oversold in an established uptrend. Replaces RSI(3) with less noise.
long: Price still above EMA(21) and VWAP
StochRSI %K starting to curl upward from below 20
short: Price still below EMA(21) and VWAP
StochRSI %K starting to curl downward from above 80
rsi7_snapback.target: RSI(7) crosses back through 50, or VWAP touch

exit_rules.priority_order: Apply in this order — first trigger hit closes the trade
exit_rules.1_hard_stop: 1x ATR(7) below entry for scalps. 1.5x ATR(14) for swing-day trades. Dynamic — does NOT use fixed % stop.
exit_rules.2_supertrend_flip: If Supertrend flips against your position, exit immediately. Structural trend break.
exit_rules.3_rsi7_momentum: RSI(7) crosses back above 50 for longs (or below 50 for shorts) = momentum exit.
exit_rules.4_macd_cross: MACD histogram crosses back below zero for longs (above for shorts) = momentum confirmation of reversal.
exit_rules.5_vwap_target: For snap-back trades: take profit at VWAP touch. Do not hold through VWAP without a reason.
exit_rules.6_ema8_cross: EMA(8) crosses back below EMA(21) for longs — original Lewis Jackson exit trigger, still valid.

risk_per_trade.7_of_7: 1.0% of account (maximum — reserved for perfect confluence)
risk_per_trade.5_of_7: 0.5% of account (minimum — do not go below this or the trade isn't worth taking)

risk_management.stop_sizing: ATR-based only. Stop = 1x ATR(7) for scalps (1m-5m), 1.5x ATR(14) for day trades (15m+). Never use a fixed % stop — it doesn't adapt to volatility.
risk_management.minimum_rr: 1.5:1 for RSI(7) snap-back scalps. 2:1 for EMA cross and Supertrend trades. 2.5:1 for BB squeeze breakouts.
risk_management.simultaneous_positions: Maximum 2% of account in open scalp positions at any one time.
risk_management.daily_loss_limit: Hard stop at -3% account drawdown for the day. Close all positions. Walk away.
risk_management.high_volatility_rule: If ATR(14) is in the top 20% of its 30-day range, cut all position sizes by 50%.
risk_management.low_volatility_rule: BB squeeze detected + ATR contracting = allowed to size up to 1.25x normal (highest edge setup).
risk_management.overextension_rule: Do not enter if price is more than 1.5% from VWAP. Wait for reversion before trading.
risk_management.max_trades_per_session: 6-8 high-conviction trades maximum. Quality over quantity.

macro_filters.btc_dominance: Check BTC.D first. Rising BTC.D = stay in BTC, avoid altcoin longs. Falling BTC.D = altcoin pumps incoming.
macro_filters.market_regime: If BTC is below its EMA(200) on the 1H chart, reduce all position sizes by 50% across the board — macro bear regime.
macro_filters.vix_proxy: Extreme crypto-wide volatility (all coins moving >5% in 1 hour) = sit out or cut to 0.25% risk per trade only.

pre_trade_checklist: 2. Is BTC above or below its 1H EMA(200)?
3. Is price above or below VWAP? (Layer 1 gate)
4. Is price above or below EMA(200)? (Layer 1 gate)
5. Is RSI(14) above or below 50? (Layer 1 gate)
6. Is price within 1.5% of VWAP? (Layer 1 gate)
7. What is my Layer 2 score? (0, 1, or 2)
8. What is my Layer 3 score? (0, 1, or 2)
9. What is my Layer 4 score? (0, 1, 2, or 3)
10. Total scored points >= 5? If yes: what size? If no: skip.
11. Where is my stop (ATR-based)? Is the R:R acceptable?
12. Have I set the stop order BEFORE entering?
notes: This strategy blends Lewis Jackson's fast RSI(7) snap-back timing and EMA(8) cross trigger with a structured 5-layer confluence hierarchy. The key improvements over both source strategies: RSI(7) replaces RSI(3) for 40% less noise; ATR-based stops replace fixed % stops; a 5/7 minimum confluence score replaces both 3/5 and the unscored Lewis Jackson rules; Supertrend confirmation is added to every setup to eliminate false EMA cross whipsaws. All entries still require the VWAP session bias gate as non-negotiable — this is the most important single rule in the system.
